footer_desc: Free browser-based tools for image, video, and document optimization. No uploads required.

page_title: Squoosh.online — Free File Optimization Tools | Compress Images, Videos & PDFs
page_description: Squoosh.online offers free, privacy-first file optimization tools powered by WebAssembly. Compress images, videos, and PDFs directly in your browser with no uploads required.
hero_subtitle: Squoosh.online is your all-in-one portal for free file optimization tools. Compress images, shrink videos, reduce PDF sizes, and create smart archives — all processed locally in your browser using cutting-edge WebAssembly technology. Your files never leave your device.
section_native_subtitle: Purpose-built tools that run entirely in your browser using WebAssembly. No server uploads, no waiting — just instant, private file processing at native speed.
tool_stitch_desc: Combine multiple images into a single panoramic or grid composition. Perfect for creating collages, comparison images, and social media content without any design software.
tool_squoosh_desc: Advanced image compression with real-time quality preview. Fine-tune JPEG, PNG, WebP, and AVIF output with precise control over quality, resolution, and encoding parameters.
tool_video_desc: Compress and transcode video files directly in your browser. Reduce video file sizes by up to 60% while maintaining visual quality using modern codec technology.
tool_zip_desc: Create and extract ZIP archives with intelligent compression. Bundle files for sharing or extract archives without installing any software on your device.
section_how_subtitle: Optimizing your files with Squoosh.online is straightforward and takes just seconds. No technical expertise required — our tools handle the complexity so you can focus on results.
step1_desc: Browse our collection of specialized optimization tools organized by file type. Whether you need to compress a JPEG photograph, shrink an MP4 video, reduce a PDF report, or create a ZIP archive, we have a purpose-built tool ready. Each tool is designed for a specific task, ensuring optimal results for your exact use case.
step2_desc: Drop your file into the tool or use the file picker to select it. Processing begins immediately on your device using WebAssembly — a technology that runs compiled code at near-native speed inside your browser. Your file is never uploaded to a server. Adjust quality sliders, format options, and other settings in real time to find the perfect balance.
step3_desc: Once processing is complete, review the optimized output and the compression statistics showing exactly how much space you saved. Click the download button to save the result directly to your device. The entire process typically takes only a few seconds for images and documents.
section_why_subtitle: We built Squoosh.online around a simple principle: powerful file optimization should be free, private, and accessible to everyone — no compromises.
feature_privacy_desc: Every file you optimize stays on your device. Our tools process data entirely within your browser using client-side technology, meaning absolutely nothing is uploaded to external servers. This makes Squoosh.online ideal for handling confidential business documents, personal photographs, and sensitive materials.
feature_wasm_desc: Our tools are powered by WebAssembly (WASM), a binary instruction format that enables near-native execution speed in web browsers. This technology allows us to run the same advanced compression algorithms used in professional desktop software, but delivered instantly through your browser with no installation required.
feature_noreg_desc: Start using any tool immediately without creating an account, providing an email address, or sharing any personal information. We believe useful tools should be instantly accessible. There are no paywalls, no forced sign-ups, and no upsell prompts interrupting your workflow.
feature_cross_desc: Squoosh.online works seamlessly across Windows, macOS, Linux, iOS, and Android. Whether you are on a desktop workstation, a laptop, a tablet, or a smartphone, our tools adapt to your screen size and input method.
feature_unlimited_desc: There are no daily limits, no file count restrictions, and no premium tiers required for full functionality. Process as many files as you need, as often as you need. Because the heavy lifting happens on your own hardware, there is no server cost for us to recoup.
feature_pro_desc: Our tools use industry-standard compression algorithms including MozJPEG, OxiPNG, libwebp, and AVIF encoders — the same libraries used by major tech companies to serve billions of optimized assets. The output quality and file size reduction matches what you would get from expensive commercial software suites.
section_partners_subtitle: We have also curated links to widely trusted third-party optimization services. These popular tools complement our native offerings and are well-regarded across the web development community.
section_faq_subtitle: Everything you need to know about using Squoosh.online and file optimization in general.
section_guides_subtitle: Dive deeper into file optimization with our comprehensive guides. Learn techniques and best practices used by professional developers and designers to deliver fast, efficient digital content.
section_blog_subtitle: Stay informed with practical insights on file optimization, web performance, and modern compression technologies.
blog1_title: The Complete Guide to Image Optimization for the Web
blog1_excerpt: Images account for nearly half of all web page weight on average. In this comprehensive guide, we break down the differences between JPEG, PNG, WebP, and AVIF formats, explain when to use lossy versus lossless compression, and walk through practical workflows for reducing image sizes by 40-80% without perceptible quality loss.
blog2_title: Video Compression Explained: Codecs, Containers & Quality
blog2_excerpt: Video files are often the largest assets in any digital project. This guide demystifies the world of video codecs — from the ubiquitous H.264 to the next-generation AV1 — and explains how containers like MP4, WebM, and MKV organize audio and video streams.
blog3_title: PDF Optimization: Shrink Documents Without Losing Quality
blog3_excerpt: PDF documents can balloon in size due to embedded fonts, high-resolution images, and redundant metadata. In this guide, we explore the internal structure of PDF files and identify the most effective optimization strategies: image downsampling, font subsetting, object stream compression, and metadata stripping.
guide_image_title: The Complete Guide to Image Optimization
guide_image_desc: Master modern image formats, understand lossy vs lossless compression, and learn how to serve the perfect image for every screen size and device.
guide_video_desc: Understand how video codecs work, compare H.264 vs H.265 vs AV1, and discover the optimal settings for web streaming, social media, and archival.
guide_pdf_desc: Learn how to dramatically reduce PDF file sizes without sacrificing print quality. Covers embedded fonts, image downsampling, and metadata removal strategies.
faq_q1: How does Squoosh.online compress files without uploading them?
faq_a1: Squoosh.online uses WebAssembly (WASM) technology to run powerful compression algorithms directly inside your web browser. When you select a file, it is processed entirely on your device using your computer's own processing power. The file never leaves your machine, which means there is no upload, no server-side processing, and no risk of your data being intercepted or stored remotely.
faq_q2: What image formats does Squoosh.online support?
faq_a2: Our image tools support all major web image formats including JPEG, PNG, WebP, AVIF, GIF, SVG, and BMP. You can compress existing images to reduce file size, convert between formats for better compatibility, and even stitch multiple images together.
faq_q3: Is there a file size limit for compression?
faq_a3: Because all processing happens locally in your browser, the file size limit depends primarily on your device's available memory (RAM) rather than arbitrary server limits. Most modern devices can comfortably handle files up to several hundred megabytes.
faq_q4: Do I need to create an account to use the tools?
faq_a4: No. Squoosh.online is completely free to use and requires no registration, no email address, and no personal information whatsoever. Simply visit the tool you need, drop in your file, and download the optimized result.
faq_q5: How much can I expect my files to be compressed?
faq_a5: Compression results vary depending on the file type and content. JPEG images typically see a 40-70% reduction. PNG images can be reduced by 50-80%. Videos can achieve 30-60% smaller file sizes. PDF files often shrink by 50-90%.
faq_q6: Is my data safe when using Squoosh.online?
faq_a6: Absolutely. Privacy is the core principle behind Squoosh.online. Your files are processed entirely within your browser using client-side WebAssembly technology. No file data is transmitted to any server, stored in any database, or accessible to anyone other than you.
faq_q7: Can I use Squoosh.online on my phone or tablet?
faq_a7: Yes. Squoosh.online is fully responsive and works on any modern device with a web browser, including smartphones, tablets, laptops, and desktop computers. The tools are optimized for touch interfaces on mobile devices.
partner_tinypng_desc: A long-standing favorite for PNG and JPEG compression. TinyPNG uses smart lossy techniques to dramatically reduce file sizes while preserving transparency and visual fidelity.
partner_iloveimg_desc: An all-in-one image editing suite offering compression, resizing, cropping, format conversion, and watermarking. Useful for batch operations on large sets of images.
partner_clideo_desc: A versatile online video toolkit for compressing, trimming, merging, and converting video files. Clideo supports a wide range of video formats and offers an intuitive interface.
partner_ezgif_desc: The go-to tool for GIF creation, optimization, and conversion. EZGif also handles video-to-GIF conversion, resizing, cropping, and adding effects to animated images.
partner_smallpdf_desc: A comprehensive PDF platform with tools for compressing, converting, merging, splitting, and signing PDF documents. One of the most widely used PDF tools on the web.
partner_pdf2go_desc: A feature-rich PDF editing and conversion platform. PDF2Go offers tools for editing, compressing, repairing, and converting PDF files along with OCR text recognition capabilities.
about_desc: Learn about Squoosh.online — our mission to democratize file optimization with free, privacy-first browser-based tools powered by WebAssembly.
contact_desc: Get in touch with the Squoosh.online team. Send us your questions, feedback, or partnership inquiries.
privacy_desc: Read the Squoosh.online Privacy Policy. Learn how we protect your data with browser-based processing and what information we collect.
terms_desc: Read the Terms of Service for Squoosh.online. Understand the rules and guidelines for using our free online file optimization tools.
about_hero_subtitle: We believe everyone deserves access to powerful, privacy-respecting file optimization tools — without paying a dime or compromising their data.
about_mission_p1: At Squoosh.online, our mission is to democratize file optimization for every person on the internet. Whether you are a professional photographer looking to compress high-resolution images without visible quality loss, a small business owner needing to shrink PDF invoices for email delivery, or a content creator preparing videos for social media platforms, we want to ensure that the tools you need are always within reach — free of charge, free of registration barriers, and free of privacy concerns.
about_mission_p2: The modern web demands speed. Search engines rank faster-loading pages higher. Visitors bounce from sites that take more than a few seconds to render. Email providers reject attachments that exceed size limits. In every corner of digital life, file size matters. Yet the tools that help people optimize their files have historically been locked behind expensive software licenses, complicated desktop installations, or cloud-based services that require you to upload sensitive documents to unknown servers. We set out to change that equation entirely.
about_mission_p3: Our approach combines two strategies. First, we build and maintain browser-based tools that leverage cutting-edge WebAssembly technology to process your files directly on your own device. Your images, documents, and media never leave your computer. Second, for tasks that require more specialized processing, we curate and recommend only the most trustworthy, highest-quality third-party tools available online. Every recommendation we make is tested, reviewed, and monitored to ensure it meets our standards for quality, privacy, and reliability.
about_story_p1: Squoosh.online was born out of frustration. Like many people who work with digital media daily, our founding team spent years wrestling with the same recurring problems: bloated image files slowing down websites, PDFs too large for email attachments, and video files that took forever to upload. The solutions available at the time were fragmented and often unsatisfactory. Desktop software like Adobe Photoshop could optimize images beautifully, but it cost hundreds of dollars a year and required significant technical knowledge. Online compression tools were free but required uploading your files to remote servers, raising serious privacy and security concerns, especially for business documents, personal photos, and confidential materials.
about_story_p2: We asked ourselves a simple question: why can't file optimization happen right inside the browser? With the maturation of WebAssembly, a technology that allows near-native performance inside web browsers, we realized the answer had finally arrived. We could build powerful compression and conversion tools that run entirely on the user's device, offering the speed and quality of desktop software with the convenience and accessibility of a website. No downloads, no installations, no server uploads, no accounts required.
about_story_p3: That vision became Squoosh.online. We launched with a handful of image optimization tools and quickly expanded to cover video compression, PDF manipulation, and a wide range of file conversion utilities. Along the way, we recognized that no single platform could do everything perfectly, so we began curating a directory of the best external tools for specialized tasks. Today, Squoosh.online serves as both a powerful toolbox and a trusted guide, helping hundreds of thousands of users around the world optimize their digital files safely, quickly, and for free.
about_diff_privacy_desc: Our native tools use WebAssembly to process your files entirely within your browser. Your images, videos, and documents never leave your device. There are no server uploads, no temporary cloud storage, and no third-party access to your content. What happens on your computer stays on your computer — period.
about_diff_curated_desc: Not every tool on the internet is trustworthy. We personally test, evaluate, and monitor every third-party service we recommend. Our editorial team assesses each tool for compression quality, ease of use, privacy practices, and reliability before it appears on our platform. If a tool does not meet our standards, it does not make the list.
about_diff_free_desc: We do not charge for our tools. There are no hidden fees, no premium tiers that lock essential features, and no registration walls that force you to hand over your email address before you can compress a single image. Our platform is sustained through non-intrusive advertising, allowing us to keep every feature completely free for every user.
about_diff_community_desc: Squoosh.online evolves based on the needs of our users. Every tool we build, every feature we add, and every guide we write is informed by real feedback from the people who use our platform. We actively listen to suggestions, bug reports, and feature requests, and we prioritize improvements that benefit the most people.
about_tech_p1: At the heart of Squoosh.online lies WebAssembly (often abbreviated as Wasm), a revolutionary technology that allows high-performance code to run directly inside your web browser. Traditionally, tasks like image compression, video transcoding, and PDF manipulation required either dedicated desktop software or powerful remote servers. WebAssembly changes that by providing a compact binary format that runs at near-native speed within the browser's sandboxed environment. This means we can offer you the same quality of file optimization that expensive desktop applications provide, but through a simple web page you can access from any device.
about_tech_p2: The privacy implications of this architecture are profound. When you use one of our native WebAssembly tools to compress an image or convert a document, the entire operation happens locally on your machine. Your file is read from your local storage, processed by the WebAssembly module running in your browser, and the optimized result is saved back to your device. At no point during this process does your file travel across the internet. No data is sent to our servers or any third-party servers. This eliminates the risk of data interception during transit, unauthorized access on remote servers, or retention of your files by service providers.
about_tech_p3: We continuously invest in improving our WebAssembly toolchain to support new file formats, better compression algorithms, and faster processing speeds. Our engineering team monitors the latest developments in browser technology to ensure compatibility across all major platforms, including Chrome, Firefox, Safari, and Edge. Whether you are on a desktop computer, a laptop, a tablet, or a smartphone, our tools are designed to deliver consistent, high-quality results with the performance and privacy you deserve.
about_values_speed_desc: We obsess over performance. Our tools are engineered to process files as fast as technically possible, so you spend less time waiting and more time creating.
about_values_privacy_desc: Your files are yours alone. We design every tool with privacy as a foundational requirement, not an afterthought. Local processing ensures your data remains under your control.
about_values_access_desc: We build for everyone. Our tools work across devices and browsers, require no technical expertise, and are always free to use regardless of your background or budget.
about_values_quality_desc: We never sacrifice output quality for the sake of smaller file sizes. Our algorithms are tuned to achieve the optimal balance between compression and visual fidelity.
about_cta_subtitle: Explore our complete suite of free, privacy-first tools for images, videos, PDFs, and more.
contact_hero_subtitle: Have a question, suggestion, or partnership inquiry? We would love to hear from you. Fill out the form below and our team will get back to you as soon as possible.
contact_message_placeholder: Tell us how we can help...
contact_response_text: We aim to respond within 48 business hours. Complex inquiries may take slightly longer.
contact_quick_subtitle: Looking for tools? Jump straight to what you need.
contact_faq_q1: Do I need to create an account to use the tools?
contact_faq_a1: No. All tools on Squoosh.online are available without registration. You can start compressing images, converting videos, or optimizing PDFs immediately without providing any personal information.
contact_faq_q2: Are my files uploaded to your servers?
contact_faq_a2: For our native browser-based tools, absolutely not. All processing happens locally on your device using WebAssembly technology. Your files never leave your computer. When we link to third-party tools, those services have their own processing methods and privacy policies, which we encourage you to review.
contact_faq_a3: Yes, completely free. We do not offer premium tiers, paid subscriptions, or hidden charges. Our platform is supported by advertising, which allows us to keep all tools and features accessible to everyone at no cost.
contact_faq_q4: Can I suggest a new tool or feature?
contact_faq_a4: Absolutely! We love hearing from our community. Use the contact form above or send an email with your suggestion. We review every piece of feedback and prioritize features based on community demand.
contact_faq_a5: Squoosh.online works on all modern browsers including Google Chrome, Mozilla Firefox, Microsoft Edge, Apple Safari, and their mobile versions. We recommend keeping your browser updated to the latest version for the best experience and full WebAssembly support.
images_hero_subtitle: Compress, convert, and optimize your images with our free browser-based tools. All processing happens locally on your device.
